title: Estimating time (seconds, minutes, and hours)
description: Practice estimating the length of an event using seconds, minutes, and hours.

assessment_items.question_content:
**Identify the most reasonable unit to measure the time it takes to peel a banana.**

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints:
A **second** is a short amount of time.  It takes about $1$ second to turn on a light or open the refrigerator door.

A **minute** is equal to $60$ seconds. It takes about $1$ minute to brush your teeth.

An **hour** is equal to $60$ minutes. Extracurricular activities (gymnastics, piano lessons, soccer practice) often last about $1$ hour.
Which of these is the most reasonable unit to measure the time it takes to peel a banana?
Seconds is the most reasonable unit.
